name: SHIFT interceptor vs cruise missile — master run
description: Master configuration for the SHIFT missile interception digital twin. It selects one scenario (which in turn references the interceptor and threat designs) and one Monte-Carlo campaign for probability-of-kill estimation. Compose it into a full AeroSim sim-config with examples/shift_missile/compose_sim_config.py, or run the P_kill Monte-Carlo with examples/shift_missile/run_monte_carlo.py.

overview.interceptor: SHIFT ~200mm agile interceptor (6-DOF plant + Luminary aero_sm surrogate, solid motor, Euler-Bernoulli airframe, INS/target EKF GNC, three-loop autopilot, EnKF corrector)
overview.threat: subsonic cruise missile, 20 km, 8 km cruise, evasive weave
overview.products: intercept trajectory, miss distance, structural margins, motor QoI, and P_kill with uncertainty bounds
